creator: christoph.larsen@synalinq.com
text:
Dear Sergey,
You got me! Yes, the LDAP module seems to be a dynamically assigned one, sitting in /usr/local/libxec/nginx/. Thank you so much for the heads-up! It is working now. Allow me to file a minor possible bug (?) under separate cover.
Thank you again, hugely appreciated. Warm regards from Kenya -
Chris
